hooks._comment: The startup guard (session-start.sh) is run by scripts/cell-init.ps1 BEFORE Codex launches, in the visible terminal and with no hook timeout. Codex's harness does not surface SessionStart-hook stdout and its hook timeout killed the guard's cold run (-> exited 1), so it is intentionally NOT a SessionStart hook here. Only the lightweight Dev Center check-in runs as a hook.
Temporal Context Protocol marker/briefing. Codex may not surface SessionStart stdout, but the marker read still proves the previous timestamp and the managed Stop hook writes the next one.
hooks.statusMessage: Temporal context: reading last_seen and current deltas...
